title: Janus Packaged Local Beta Environment Security Baseline
route: TEST SKILL SECURITY -> custom packaged-local beta runner -> SKILL 7

compilerStatus.reason: Spec 11 validates Janus' packaged local Electron beta deployment model. A custom runner verifies build artifacts, local backend health, AppData isolation, secret handling and update metadata.

cases.expectedEvidence: Electron/package config declares packaged local app with backend executable resource
Production frontend bundle exists and passes verification markers
Backend executable exists and PyInstaller resources exclude local .env
Local backend health endpoint returns HTTP 200
AppData runtime state and packaged resource paths are separated
Runtime credentials use Keyring/AppData/env; no packaged .env
Packaged app origin and devtools behavior are gated
latest.yml and update manifest are internally consistent
Generated evidence contains no raw secret patterns
PASS decision recorded for packaged-local beta model
